roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:CALIFORNIA STATE PAROL AGENT, RAMY YASSINE, ALSO APPEARS,/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:70 D/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 15 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE NO CREDIT FOR TIME LOSS WHILE ABSCONDEDFROM PAROLE SUPERVISION,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:07-06-19/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:THE COURT ORDERS DEFT PAY RESTITUTION TO THE CALIFORNIA DEPT OF CORRECTIONS & REHABILITATION (CDCR), IN THE AMOUNT OF $500, TO REPLACE THE DESTROYED GPS DEVICE AND THAT THE GPS CHARGING DEVICE ALSO BE RETURNED TOCDCR,/ /X:DEFT ADVISES THE COURT THE GPS CHARGER IS CURRENTLY HELD BY POLICE PROPERTY,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/X:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVLY REVOKED/   /CONTD:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:04-12-18/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND PROBABLECAUSE HEARING/
